nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1969 in Brisbane, Australia; involved in drug trafficking, arms dealing, and other crimes.
Outlaw motorcycle club; member Ross Brand was murdered by Rebels associates in 2008.
Outlaw motorcycle club that established a chapter in Perth in 2009, sparking a violent feud with the Rebels.
Outlaw motorcycle club; member Anthony Perish was involved in the homicide of Terry Falconer alongside Rebels member Andrew Perish.

edges.context: Rebels associates murdered Bandidos member Ross Brand in 2008.
Violent feud sparked by defections and turf war after Rock Machine established a chapter in Perth in 2009.
Members of both clubs (Anthony Perish of Gypsy Jokers and Andrew Perish of Rebels) were jointly involved in the homicide of Terry Falconer.
